hyperedges.label: Theme login funnel: Truecaller → KwikPass/Shopflo → GoKwik → Loyalty wallet
phd-loyalty-worker inbound (Shopify Flow + GoKwik + theme + admin)
Two parallel loyalty systems on the storefront
TWO custom PHD backends (web vs mobile) — different domains, separate codebases
All MCPs share Cloudflare OAuthProvider (OAUTH_KV / MCP_USERS)
Google OAuth shared by 4 Google-tier MCPs
Meta Graph API consumers (3 MCPs + daily report)
Shopify Admin consumers (every project that touches the store)
Puppeteer GoKwik scrapers (UI breakage SPOF)
Daily intelligence pipeline → PHD Sheet
PHD Sheet is convergence point for all reporting
